title: FlowExecution
description: Runtime state of a single flow instance. Tracks current step, step results, context data, and lifecycle transitions. Created when a flow is initiated; updated as steps complete.

flow_type.description: Copied from the Flow definition at instantiation time. Immutable after creation.

organization_id.description: Owning organization. Copied from the Flow definition at instantiation time.

status.description: FlowInstance lifecycle state. See §9.9.2 for states and §9.9.3 for normative transitions.

current_step.description: Name of the currently executing step (from the FLOW_STEPS sequence for this flow_type)

step_results.description: Keyed by step name. Each value records the step result and completion timestamp.

context_data.description: Arbitrary execution context shared across steps (e.g. applicant data, session tokens)

issued_credential_id.description: References IssuedCredential.id, populated after successful issuance

expires_at.description: Hard expiry deadline. Instance transitions to EXPIRED if not completed by this time.

error_code.description: Terminal error code (present when status is FAILED). See protocol/messages/SPECIFICATION.md for error code registry.
